# Shadow and height calculation

## Short Teaching Summary
Shadow and height calculation: Architects use trigonometry to determine the required height of a building based on its shadow. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
